metadata.title: FactWeaver - The Active Fact-Checking Engine
metadata.description: Bridge the Narrative Gap between what public figures say and what the data proves. AI-powered investigative intelligence for journalists.

cta.title: Ready to Uncover the Truth?
cta.description: Start your investigation today. Free tier available for independent journalists.

dispute.title: Dispute Resolution
dispute.content: For legal matters, please contact legal@FactWeaver.io. We are committed to resolving disputes through good-faith negotiation.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using FactWeaver's services, you accept and agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

services.title: 2. Description of Services
services.content: FactWeaver provides investigative intelligence tools including document analysis, entity extraction, relationship mapping, and fact-checking capabilities. Services are provided on a subscription basis as described in your service agreement.

account.title: 3. Account Responsibilities
account.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

usage.title: 4. Acceptable Use
usage.content: You agree to use our services only for lawful investigative purposes. You may not use our services to harass individuals, violate privacy laws, or conduct activities outside legitimate journalism and research.

data.title: 5. Data and Privacy
data.content: Your use of our services is governed by our Privacy Policy. We are committed to source protection and data minimization. For maximum security, consider our self-hosted Bunker deployment.

ip.title: 6. Intellectual Property
ip.content: FactWeaver's technology, including our GraphRAG engine and visualization tools, is protected by intellectual property laws. Your investigation data remains entirely yours.

liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: FactWeaver provides tools for investigation but does not guarantee the accuracy of extracted information. Journalists remain responsible for verification before publication.

termination.title: 8. Termination
termination.content: We may terminate access for violations of these terms. Upon termination, you can export all your data. We never retain investigation data after account closure.

changes.title: 9. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may modify these terms with notice. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

governing.title: 10. Governing Law
governing.content: These terms shall be governed by applicable international law, with disputes resolved through arbitration in a neutral jurisdiction.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: FactWeaver is built on a foundation of privacy. We believe source protection and data minimization aren't features - they're requirements. This policy explains how we handle your information.

collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect only what's necessary: account information for billing and support, and usage metrics to improve our service. For Bunker deployments, we collect nothing - your data never touches our systems.

usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
usage.content: Account information is used for service delivery and support. We never analyze, mine, or monetize your investigation data. Period.

sharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We never share your data with third parties. We have no advertising partners, no data brokers, no exceptions. We will resist any legal demands for user data to the fullest extent possible.

security.title: 4. Data Security
security.content: All cloud data is encrypted at rest and in transit. For maximum security, our Bunker deployment runs entirely on your infrastructure with zero network egress.

retention.title: 5. Data Retention
retention.content: We retain account data only while your account is active. Upon deletion, all data is permanently removed within 30 days. We keep no backups of investigation data.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights
rights.content: You can export all your data at any time. You can delete your account and all associated data at any time. No questions asked.

cookies.title: 7. Cookies
cookies.content: We use only essential cookies for authentication. No tracking cookies, no analytics pixels, no third-party scripts.

changes.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We will notify you of any changes via email. We will never weaken privacy protections without explicit opt-in consent.

contact.title: 9. Contact Us
contact.content: For privacy concerns, contact privacy@FactWeaver.io. For sensitive communications, use our SecureDrop or Signal.

footer.description: The Active Fact-Checking Engine for investigative journalism.

newsletter.title: Stay informed
newsletter.description: Get updates on investigative tools and journalism resources.
